goal: Reduce 4P early annihilation by reserving garrison on owned planets that face inbound enemy fleets, before offensive wave selection.
change: Called in plan_lite_waves right after source_budget = obs.ships.clone().
Hard source-budget constraint (not a score bonus), threat-triggered and savable-gated.
Enabled in CONFIG_4P; propagates to all 4P modes. 2P unaffected (player_count<4 early return).
baseline_reference: sample110 on the fixed 30-seed pool: 13W/17L, placement 1.60, diff -651.37, crash 0%.
